idea-plugin.name: Lisette
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for Lisette in GoLand, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, and other LSP-capable JetBrains IDEs.

Backed by the lis lsp language server. Requires the lis CLI to be installed and on your PATH.

Features provided via LSP: diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, find references, code completion, signature help, document formatting, and document symbols. Syntax highlighting is provided by the same TextMate grammar used by the VSCode extension.

Rename refactoring (⇧F6) is not wired up: JetBrains' LSP API does not bridge textDocument/rename as of IntelliJ Platform 2024.3. Use Find Usages (⌥F7) as a workaround.
idea-plugin.change-notes: 0.1.0 — Initial release. Syntax highlighting via the Lisette TextMate grammar plus LSP-backed diagnostics, hover, goto, references, completion, signature help, formatting, and document symbols.
